series_metadata.series_description: Inspection reports related to routine inspections of weighing & measuring devices and commodities sold by either weight or measure. These inspections are performed by ODA personnel, county inspectors, city inspectors, as well as, registered service persons. This includes annual reports filed by local jurisdictions. These inspections occur daily.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Keep 3 (three) years ; Electronic: Keep 3 (three) years
